seoTitle: Sandstone vs Sandy Gully — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandstone and Sandy Gully. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandstone vs Sandy Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandstone and Sandy Gully.
heading: Sandstone vs Sandy Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandstone, Western Australia and Sandy Gully, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Sandstone (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandstone or Sandy Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandstone has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Sandy Gully scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandstone scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Sandy Gully scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandstone or Sandy Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
